outlier_sessions.description: Four sessions excluded from Table 1 statistics. Excluded on basis of anomalous delta mean magnitude relative to trial block mean (>3 SD below block mean in absolute value), confirmed by positioning inspection. Exclusion criterion is magnitude-based and independent of sign result.
outlier_sessions.exclusion_criterion: Absolute delta mean magnitude more than 3 SD below trial block mean, confirmed by post-session positioning review. Trial block defined as contiguous run of 5 sessions with same material in single sitting.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Photograph partially outside detection region. 6.1 SD below block mean in absolute magnitude.
sessions.threshold_analysis: At deployed threshold of 800: spatial_variance (516.43) < 800 — SV criterion passes. Delta sign also passes (+11.69 > 0). Session would be classified LIVE at threshold 800. Exclusion is valid on positioning grounds independently of threshold analysis.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Anomalous spatial variance drop mid-block. Photograph shifted position.
Same block shift. Spatial variance anomalously low.
First run of first block; screen not yet in position at capture start.
sessions.threshold_analysis: At threshold 800: SV (2839) > 800 — correctly rejected by SV criterion despite positive sign.

warmup_characterization.conclusion: At threshold 800, insufficient warmup does not produce false acceptance. Live face passes both criteria at 2-frame warmup; printed photo fails SV criterion despite positive sign.
